overall_justification: While the newspaper reports on Galeão Carvalhal's speech and his past support for modifying the gold standard, the article's framing and concluding remarks clearly criticize Carvalhal's inconsistencies and express skepticism towards the Caixa de Conversão project. The criticism centers on the perceived incoherence and potential negative consequences of the project, aligning with core tenets of the Orthodox perspective.

supporting_evidence.quote: O sr. Galeão Carvalhal confessou que s. ex. acceita o projecto em debate mas já teve idéas mais radicaes.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Highlights Carvalhal's shift in position, setting a critical tone.

supporting_evidence.quote: Mas ha algo de peor em tudo isso e é que do projecto em debate não podem derivar proveitos de espécie alguma para o paiz.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Expresses a pessimistic view of the Caixa de Conversão, aligning with Orthodox concerns.

supporting_evidence.quote: A historia financeira destes últimos dias prova até que o paiz pôde esperar do projecto maiores prejuízos.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Reinforces the negative outlook and potential harm, a typical Orthodox argument.
